taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [nILAxH, U7kof, quk1JO, R476m3k, WxhESn, 9aaM5RK, i02m2VTm, 2LQaJ, JGwQNF, ZPvudV, eAI3Pys, wLyiST, RZqWHYN, KROWEMARF, 9ZtXLH, a9twZshU, TSCOwe, W5laMaI, 7RhSl, ftucs, O5L1UW, MMZO4Y8, UMspXWso, 2mACsiR, iDEXDN, qXBNYD, 70ptC, ET3I7Vzn, b8cDNUm, cRHNnr, 5aq4Zk, zPyyYVC, u2DJz6vM, qxxZ4wo, CRbr9, osvfkZM8, Jqw00V7, zQrU0, NLuexy8r, SZT5ugB, l3Bng, 8rz4X3MT, k2gAAD4q, XXaT5l, p6H8Tc, mnWX732e, oVAeInw0, boSVB, HgyVkWms, 4X8VgIA]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
